title: jurinea mollis subsp. subhastata
intro: Jurinea mollis subsp. subhastata, also known as Jurinea, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Jurinea can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
